posts.text: FYI: I'm particularly opinionated on this topic for a variety of reasons, including having spent several years working at a non-profit that was ostensibly created to protect artists, but which in reality just lines the pockets of the labels.

It doesn't matter if fair use is formally codified or mandatory royalty is codified or any of it, *if the enforcement procedure remains ad hoc*.

There is no body responsible for enforcing these rules. Your property is only protected if you are willing to spend the energy to protect it yourself.
